name: Orora Limited
analysis: ORA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 43% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.3600, stop A$1.2276, target A$1.5250 (1.25:1) — then trail it.
